identity.name: Data Storyteller Studio
identity.description: A precision tool for data artists. Dark, sharp, and strictly functional. Inspired by retro-futuristic interfaces and command-line aesthetics.
principles: Content: Data is the hero. Chrome is minimal.
Contrast: Stark Black vs. Electric Amber.
Shape: 0px Border Radius. Sharp edges only.

layout.glassmorphism: None. Use solid backgrounds with 1px borders for the 'Terminal' look.

buttons.default: rounded-none border border-primary bg-transparent text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-black transition-all uppercase tracking-wider font-mono text-xs
buttons.primary: rounded-none bg-primary text-black hover:bg-primary/90 uppercase tracking-wider font-mono text-xs

inputs.style: rounded-none border-b border-border bg-transparent px-0 focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-primary placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50 font-mono

textures: Scanlines: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 0px, rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 2px)

images.description: Abstract wavy metallic grid. Use as a subtle background overlay with low opacity (10-20%) in the Hero or Empty State areas.
Retro CRT Monitors. Use for the 'About' modal or a 'Welcome' screen.

assets.icons: lucide-react (Default). Use thin strokes (1.5px) to match the minimal aesthetic.

3d_strategy.library: None required for this MVP. Focus on 2D Chart interactivity (Recharts/Shadcn Charts).

setup: Install fonts: Space Mono, Inter, JetBrains Mono.
Update tailwind.config.js with the 'colors' and 'borderRadius: 0' settings.
Ensure all Shadcn components are updated to remove rounded corners (radius-0).
layout_rules: Use a fixed sidebar layout for the main app.
The 'Workspace' view should look like a file explorer (List/Grid view).
The 'Chat' interface should feel like a terminal or code editor.
The 'Storyboard' should use a masonry or grid layout for the tiles.
component_overrides: Button: Remove all border-radius. Use uppercase text.
Input: Remove border-radius. Use bottom-border only style for a cleaner look.
Dialog/Modal: Remove border-radius. Add a 'glitch' effect on open if possible (optional).

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
